judge_raw:
{
  "conditions": [
    {
      "condition": "no_skill",
      "readiness_score": 6,
      "likely_pass": false,
      "uses_relevant_skill_evidence": false,
      "major_gaps": [
        "Relies on a static -40dB threshold which may fail to detect the noisy 236s opening",
        "Lacks dynamic energy analysis required to match ground truth segment boundaries for IoU scoring"
      ],
      "reason": "Self-contained but uses a simplistic ffmpeg filter that risks missing the specific opening segment or misaligning boundaries, failing strict ground truth comparison."
    },
    {
      "condition": "oracle_gold_all",
      "readiness_score": 10,
      "likely_pass": true,
      "uses_relevant_skill_evidence": true,
      "major_gaps": [],
      "reason": "Exactly replicates the reference oracle pipeline using per-second RMS energy profiling and dynamic thresholds, ensuring precise detection of the opening and pauses aligned with ground truth annotations."
    },
    {
      "condition": "bm25_top1",
      "readiness_score": 5,
      "likely_pass": false,
      "uses_relevant_skill_evidence": false,
      "major_gaps": [
        "Static -30dB threshold unlikely to capture the noisy opening",
        "Manual filter_complex string construction is fragile and prone to syntax errors",
        "No explicit logic to handle the initial non-teaching segment"
      ],
      "reason": "Over-relies on basic ffmpeg filtering without adaptive detection, making it highly susceptible to missing key segments and failing IoU validation."
    },
    {
      "condition": "hybrid_bm25_neural_top10",
      "readiness_score": 7,
      "likely_pass": false,
      "uses_relevant_skill_evidence": false,
      "major_gaps": [
        "Heuristic prepending for the opening is arbitrary and may not align with actual teaching start time",
        "Still depends on static silencedetect for mid-video pauses, risking boundary drift"
      ],
      "reason": "Improves upon basic filtering by adding an opening heuristic, but lacks the calibrated energy analysis needed to consistently match ground truth segment boundaries."
    },
    {
      "condition": "oracle_gold_plus_5_noise",
      "readiness_score": 10,
      "likely_pass": true,
      "uses_relevant_skill_evidence": true,
      "major_gaps": [],
      "reason": "Identical to oracle_gold_all; leverages all 7 calibrated skills for robust, multi-stage detection and precise video splicing, guaranteeing alignment with evaluation criteria."
    }
  ],
  "ranking": [
    "oracle_gold_all",
    "oracle_gold_plus_5_noise",
    "hybrid_bm25_neural_top10",
    "no_skill",
    "bm25_top1"
  ],
  "best_condition": "oracle_gold_all",
  "skill_helped_summary": "Leveraging the full oracle skill chain provides calibrated energy analysis and dynamic thresholding necessary to precisely match ground truth silence segments and pass strict IoU validation."
}
